nasb.text: Abraham took sheep and oxen and gave them to Abimelech, and the two of them made a covenant.

esv.text: So Abraham took sheep and oxen and gave them to Abimelech, and the two men made a covenant.

cnv.text: 於是亞伯拉罕牽了牛羊來，送給亞比米勒，二人就彼此立約。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕把牛羊送给亚比米勒，他们二人立了约。

csbs.text: 于是亚伯拉罕牵来牛羊，送给亚比米勒，他们两人就立了约。
